## What's Changed

### New Features

- **Custom Fonts**: You can now upload your own font files and apply them to the router interface — no more being limited to the built-in font choices.
- **Login Page Background**: Upload a photo or image directly from the new Asset Library and set it as your login page background. The page will also show a smooth blurred preview while the full image loads.
- **Favicon & App Icons**: Customize the small icon shown in browser tabs (favicon), as well as the icons used when you add the router page to your phone's home screen as a web app.
- **Border Radius Control**: A new slider in the Layout & Typography tab lets you adjust how rounded the corners of buttons and cards look — from sharp and square to soft and pill-shaped.
- **Drag-and-Drop Asset Library**: The image manager has been redesigned. You can now drag files straight onto the upload area to add them, and the library scrolls smoothly even with many images.

### Improvements

- **Simplified Settings Layout**: The "Structure" and "Fonts" settings tabs have been merged into one "Layout & Typography" tab, making it easier to find everything in one place.
- **Faster Page Load**: The configuration page now opens noticeably faster — a slow package-manager check that used to run on every load has been moved out of the critical path.

### Bug Fixes

- Fixed an issue where switching theme presets would not save correctly, causing the selection to revert after a page reload.

### Other Changes

- Updated translations for existing languages.
- For remaining changes, see the [full changelog](https://github.com/eamonxg/luci-app-aurora-config/compare/v0.3.0...v0.4.0)
